revision.text:
{{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe revision.comment: Text replacement - "町の歴史" to "の Municipal History"
revision.text:
{{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} == References == === Notes === === Sources === {{Reflist}} == External links== * [http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html {{ill|Kurikara Fudō-ji|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara Fudō-ji|qq=}}] ** {{YouTube|user=kurikarahudouji|Kurikara-san Fudō-ji}} ** {{Twitter|Kurikara_fudou|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} ** {{Instagram|kurikara_fudouji|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{Buddhism-stub}} {{translated page|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|version=103467315|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[sn:Kurikara Fudō-ji]]}} [[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[sn:Kurikara Fudō-ji]] revision.comment: Merge [[Category:石川県内のMunicipal designated tangible cultural property]] into [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Ishikawa Prefecture]] via bot
revision.text:
{{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} == References == === Notes === === Sources === {{Reflist}} == External links== * [http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html {{ill|Kurikara Fudō-ji|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara Fudō-ji|qq=}}] ** {{YouTube|user=kurikarahudouji|Kurikara-san Fudō-ji}} ** {{Twitter|Kurikara_fudou|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} ** {{Instagram|kurikara_fudouji|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{Buddhism-stub}} {{translated page|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|version=103467315|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[sn:Kurikara Fudō-ji]]}} [[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[sn:Kurikara Fudō-ji]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|qq=}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=}} == References == === Notes === === Sources It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|qid=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|qq=|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|qq=|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|qq=|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|qq=|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} == References == === Notes === === Sources === {{Reflist}} == External links== * [http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html {{ill|Kurikara Fudō-ji|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara Fudō-ji|qq=}}] ** {{YouTube|user=kurikarahudouji|Kurikara-san Fudō-ji}} ** It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR [[sn:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|WD=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} == References == === Notes === === Sources === {{Reflist}} == External links== * [http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html {{ill|Kurikara Fudō-ji|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara Fudō-ji|qq=}}] ** {{YouTube|user=kurikarahudouji|Kurikara-san Fudō-ji}} ** It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe [[sn:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|WD=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe [[sn:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|WD=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced [[commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[sn:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|WD=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 30 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Fudō-ji|ja|倶利迦羅不動寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara Fudō-ji|qq=}}] ** {{YouTube|user=kurikarahudouji|Kurikara-san Fudō-ji}} ** {{Twitter|Kurikara_fudou|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} ** It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR [[co:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[co:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] [[sn:commons:Category:Kurikarafudouji, Tsubata]][[ja:倶利迦羅不動寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Kurikarafudouji hououden wisteria.jpg|religious_affiliation={{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357}}|prefecture={{ill|Tsubata|WD=Q432014}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.66352777777778|N|136.81558333333334|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28690539]] Wikidata name: Kurikarafudō-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Kurikara Fudō-ji in Tsubata, Ishikawa Prefecture|A temple located in Moriyama-ku, Nagoya City|Kurikara Fudō-ji}} {{infobox religious building |名称 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |image = [[File:Kurikarafudouji Gokaicho.jpg|280px]] |image説明 = Main Hall of Kurikara Fudō-ji |所在地 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}リ-２
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）[[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]] [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] 竹橋ク128 |ISO = JP-17 |位置 = |緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 39 |緯度秒 = 48.7 |経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 48 |経度秒 = 56.1 |ラベル位置 = right |地図 = Japan Ishikawa |山号 = Kōyasan |院号 = |宗旨 = |宗派 = [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]] |寺格 = {{ill|Bekkaku Honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bekkaku Honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24887668}} |本尊 = Kurikara Fudō Myōō |創建年 = |開山 = [[812nd year ]] |開基 = |中興年 = |中興 = |正式名 = Koyasan Shingon Buddhism Bekkaku Honzan Kurikara-san Fudō-ji |別称 = |札所等 = （'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja|北陸不動霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Fudō Reijō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 第24番
（'''Mountain Top Main Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸白寿観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Hakujyu Kannon Reijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404430}} 第18番
（'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon Buddhism]], designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in [[:en:Ishikawa Prefecture|Ishikawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kahoku District, Ishikawa|Kahoku District]], [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]], and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit [[:en:Sanskrit|Sanskrit]] word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of [[:en:Empress Genshō|Genshō Tennō]]. * In the 2nd year of [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] (812), [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of [[:en:Tsubata, Ishikawa|Tsubata Town]] == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata Station|Tsubata Station]] ** 20 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from [[:en:Hokuriku Expressway|Hokuriku Expressway]] {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|ja|金沢東インターチェンジ|lt=Kanazawa Higashi IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} * Phoenix Hall ** 15 minutes by car from [[:en:IR Ishikawa Railway|IR Ishikawa Railway]] [[:en:Tsubata It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Genshō Tennō}}. * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} (812), {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. （'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357|lt=Koyasan Shingon Buddhism}}, designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|WD=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|en|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|WD=Q1130942|lt=Kahoku District}}, {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}}, and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit {{ill|Sanskrit|en|Sanskrit|WD=Q11059|lt=Sanskrit}} word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Genshō Tennō}}. * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} (812), {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from {{ill|IR Ishikawa Railway|en|IR Ishikawa Railway|WD=Q11585936|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway}} {{ill|Tsubata Station|en|Tsubata Station|WD=Q3701490|lt=Tsubata Station}} ** 20 minutes by car from {{ill|Hokuriku Expressway|en|Hokuriku Expressway|WD=Q1549512|lt=Hokuriku Expressway}} {{ill|Koyabe Interchange|ja|小矢部インターチェンジ|lt=Koyabe IC|lt_ja=小矢部IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyabe Interchange|1=Oyabe interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10959851}} ** 40 minutes by car from {{ill|Hokuriku Expressway|en|Hokuriku Expressway|WD=Q1549512|lt=Hokuriku Expressway}} {{ill|Kanazawa Higashi Station|WD=Q3701490|lt=Tsubata Station}} ** 30 minutes by car from {{ill|Hokuriku Expressway|en|Hokuriku Expressway|WD=Q1549512|lt=Hokuriku Expressway}} {{ill|Koyabe IC|lt_ja=金沢東IC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazawa Higashi Interchange|1=Kanazawa-higashi interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11647484}} == References == === Notes === === （'''Phoenix Hall'''）{{ill|Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|ja|北陸三十三ヵ所観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuriku 33 Kannon Reijō|1=Hokuriku Kannon Pilgrimage Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404440}} 特番 |文化財 = |公式HP = http://www.kurikara.or.jp/index.html |公式HP名 = Kurikara Fudō-ji |地図2 = }} [[File:kurikarafudouji hououden.jpg|thumb|250px|Phoenix Hall]] '''Kurikara Fudō-ji''' (倶利迦羅不動寺) is a temple of {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357|lt=Koyasan Shingon Buddhism}}, designated as a Bekkaku Honzan, located in {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|WD=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|en|Kahoku District, Ishikawa|WD=Q1130942|lt=Kahoku District}}, {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}}, and in the area known as {{ill|Kurikara|ja|倶利伽羅 (津幡町)|lt=Kurikara|lt_ja=倶利伽羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurikara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.Although some sources record the name as “倶利'''伽'''羅不動寺” in accordance with local usage, the official website consistently uses “倶利'''迦'''羅不動寺”. ==概要== {{Expand section}} '''Kurikara''' is derived from the Sanskrit {{ill|Sanskrit|en|Sanskrit|WD=Q11059|lt=Sanskrit}} word “kulihah”. It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Genshō Tennō}}. * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} (812), {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} === 古文書 === * It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Genshō Tennō}}. * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} (812), {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa}} (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} === 史跡 === * Nanono Tomb Group (Graves 2, 3, 4): Historic Site of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town}} == アクセス== * Mountain Top Main Hall ** 20 minutes by car from {{ill|IR Ishikawa Railway|en|IR Ishikawa Railway|WD=Q11585936|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway}} {{ill|Tsubata Station|en|Tsubata Station|WD=Q3701490|lt=Tsubata Station}} ** 20 minutes by car from {{ill|Hokuriku Expressway|en|Hokuriku It means “the black dragon of complete fortune and virtue” and comes from the name of the principal image, in which a sword is entwined by a {{ill|Black Dragon|ja|黒龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Black Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 黒竜|1=black dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11288580}}.{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.kurikara.or.jp/history/index.html|title=About Kurikara Fudō-ji|publisher=Kurikara Fudō-ji|accessdate=2018-07-23}}{{Cite news|title=Celebration Ceremony for the 1300th Foundation Year|newspaper=Hokkoku Shimbun|date=2018-04-29|page=28}} ==歴史== * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} (718), it is said that Kurikara Fudō Myōō was enshrined by the imperial command of {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|WD=Q235343|lt=Genshō Tennō|1=Empress Genshō}}. * In the 2nd year of {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin|1=Kōnin (era)}} (812), {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} (Kōbō Daishi) carved a Fudō-son statue identical to the principal image and established Chōraku-ji as a head temple. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa era}} (1949), temple buildings were reconstructed on the site of the Chōraku-ji ruins, and the temple was restored as Kurikara Fudō-ji. [[File:Oman Jizo (Kurikara).jpg|thumb|人柱となった地元の少女を祀る「おまん地蔵」]] == Cultural Properties == === 絵画 === * Arhat statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town|1=Tsubata, Ishikawa}} * Eleven-faced Kannon Bodhisattva statue: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town|1=Tsubata, Ishikawa}} === 古文書 === * Letters of Minamoto no Yoritomo: Designated Cultural Property of {{ill|Tsubata, Ishikawa|en|Tsubata, Ishikawa|WD=Q432014|lt=Tsubata Town|1=Tsubata, Ishikawa}}
